name: mailchimp-claude-skills
description: Brand-neutral toolkit for authoring custom-coded responsive Mailchimp email templates with full MCTL support. Covers mc:edit / mc:repeatable / mc:variant / mc:hideable placement, merge tags and conditionals, the responsive table scaffold, Outlook hardening (MSO conditionals, VML bulletproof buttons), dark mode, accessibility (WCAG AA contrast, alt text, lang attribute, semantic order, role=presentation), CSS inlining workflow, and a pre-upload validator that catches the structural mistakes that silently break Mailchimp imports. Ships with a brand-neutral skeleton, a structural pattern library (section openers, repeatable card grids with hideable filler, multi-column footer, contact blocks, pull quotes, stat rows, dividers, button variants, feature lists), and five archetype blueprints (newsletter, promotional, transactional, announcement, re-engagement).
